history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man stands outside a modern building, holding a cup of iced coffee and looking to his right. He's wearing a white t-shirt with a large, black and white portrait of a man printed on the front, a black baseball cap, and very baggy camouflage pants in shades of black, white, and gray. His sneakers are brown.

The background features a sleek building with large glass windows and a wooden slatted overhang. Green plants are visible in planters along the building's facade, and a white metal fence separates the walkway from the planters. To the right, a prominent black and white sign with yellow accents indicates "CUSTOMER PICK-UP," featuring an icon of a car with a trunk opening and a person. Several cylindrical bollards with yellow tops are spaced along the sidewalk. The lighting suggests a bright, sunny day, casting soft shadows. The overall mood is casual and urban.
